title: Rusta Q4: Improved profitability closes the year
summary_md:
# Rusta Q4: Improved profitability closes the year

**Feed**: inderes-se  
**Published**: 2026-06-09  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This is an Inderes TV interview with Rusta's new CEO Katrin Wiksell and CFO Sofie Malmunger following the Q4 (and full-year 2025-26) report. Rusta reported growth across all segments, over 14% comparable growth in the quarter, 40 new stores, online launches in Germany and Norway, and improved profitability driven by higher home-decoration share, cost efficiency from its bonded warehouse, and a favourable dollar, offset by a negative NOK/EUR currency effect; the company ends the year in a net cash position with a recommended 50% dividend. The tone is operational and constructive, with no analyst buy/sell recommendation given.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
